remaining_params.SpellDescription: Target non-Aura enchantment you control becomes a creature in addition to its other types and has base power and toughness each equal to its mana value.
remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select target non-Aura enchantment you control
remaining_params.StackDescription: {c:Targeted} becomes a creature in addition to its other types and has base power and toughness each equal to its mana value.

params.Description: Enchantment creatures you control have deathtouch, lifelink, and hexproof.
